discussion_comments.comment_body: We could use the new `query.cancel()` method here :)
added. I notcied that `query.cancel` isn't in the readme api or in the `.d.ts` definition, which is probably why I missed it...

discussion_comments.comment_body:
drive-by comment as I saw your posts on Bluesky...

if you hadn't already come across it, thought it'd be helpful to point to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues/34745, which explains (some of?) the type issues with integrating the plugin's config (and the expect error overrides you needed).

Issue was closed but the fix hasn't been published yet. You may have a better time with integration once it is 😄
